name: @madewellrd/rda
description: RRDA - Rapid Research Development Analysis for open-source competitive intelligence

scripts.alerts:digest: tsx -e "import dotenv from 'dotenv'; dotenv.config(); import { AlertOrchestrator } from './src/notifiers/AlertOrchestrator.js'; const a = new AlertOrchestrator(); await a.sendDailyDigest(); import { closePool } from './src/database/pool.js'; await closePool();"
scripts.alerts:weekly: tsx -e "import dotenv from 'dotenv'; dotenv.config(); import { AlertOrchestrator } from './src/notifiers/AlertOrchestrator.js'; const a = new AlertOrchestrator(); await a.sendWeeklyReport(); import { closePool } from './src/database/pool.js'; await closePool();"
